{{Infobox group
| name = Dreadgod cults
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Dreadgod cults Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dreadgod]] cults are groups of followers associated with the [[Dreadgods]]. These organizations are viewed as enemies by most people and are known for being lawless, reckless, and predatory, often feeding on actual [[sacred artists]]. Members of these cults typically originate from humble backgrounds, though they follow unconventional paths to advancement through the use of [[hunger madra]]. This specific type of power allows cultists to advance quickly, yet it often prevents them from reaching great heights of strength. While they have not always been major competitors, recent developments have seen them secure multiple positions in certain arenas. Currently, they are considered a danger to survivors of the [[Wandering Titan]] and are known to drift around territories, sometimes being driven off by powerful entities but remaining nearby.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As competitive groups within the [[Uncrowned]] tournament, the [[Dreadgod]] cults are regarded as enemies to all people. During [[Reigan Shen]]'s participation in the tournament, three [[Monarchs]] representing these cults were selected to compete. The presence of [[sacred artists]] from these groups was later noted at [[Sky's Edge]], where the cults worked to pin [[Fury]] and several others.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Three [[Monarchs]] from the [[Dreadgod cults]] were selected for [[Reigan Shen]] in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgod cults]] are groups that compete in the [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgod cults]] are considered enemies to anyone.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgod cults]] are pinning [[Fury]] and others in [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sacred artists from the [[Dreadgod cults]] are present at [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dreadgod cults]] are a faction in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|There are four [[Dreadgod cults]] positioned over the four peaks of [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Half the crowd at the fighting tent comes from the [[Dreadgod cults]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
